'''boshanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:reacidifying|reacidifying]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-sh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reacidifying|reacidifying]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| boshanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:boshanithi|boshanithi]] || [[word:boshaniji|boshaniji]] || [[word:boshanishi|boshanishi]] || [[word:boshaniki|boshaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:boshanuthuthu|boshanuthuthu]] || [[word:boshanujuju|boshanujuju]] || [[word:boshanushushu|boshanushushu]] || [[word:boshanukuku|boshanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:boshanuthu|boshanuthu]] || [[word:boshanuju|boshanuju]] || [[word:boshanushu|boshanushu]] || [[word:boshanuku|boshanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:boshanufthuf|boshanufthuf]] || [[word:boshanufjuf|boshanufjuf]] || [[word:boshanufshuf|boshanufshuf]] || [[word:boshanufkuf|boshanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:boshanethe|boshanethe]] || [[word:boshaneje|boshaneje]] || [[word:boshaneshe|boshaneshe]] || [[word:boshaneke|boshaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:boshanothotho|boshanothotho]] || [[word:boshanojojo|boshanojojo]] || [[word:boshanoshosho|boshanoshosho]] || [[word:boshanokoko|boshanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:boshanotho|boshanotho]] || [[word:boshanojo|boshanojo]] || [[word:boshanosho|boshanosho]] || [[word:boshanoko|boshanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:boshanofthof|boshanofthof]] || [[word:boshanofjof|boshanofjof]] || [[word:boshanofshof|boshanofshof]] || [[word:boshanofkof|boshanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:boshanïfthïf|boshanïfthïf]] || [[word:boshanïfjïf|boshanïfjïf]] || [[word:boshanïfshïf|boshanïfshïf]] || [[word:boshanïfkïf|boshanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:boshanïfthïfthïf|boshanïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:boshanïfjïfjïf|boshanïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:boshanïfshïfshïf|boshanïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:boshanïfkïfkïf|boshanïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:boshanïfthïf|boshanïfthïf]] || [[word:boshanïfjïf|boshanïfjïf]] || [[word:boshanïfshïf|boshanïfshïf]] || [[word:boshanïfkïf|boshanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:boshanïfthïf|boshanïfthïf]] || [[word:boshanïfjïf|boshanïfjïf]] || [[word:boshanïfshïf|boshanïfshïf]] || [[word:boshanïfkïf|boshanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:boshanæthæ|boshanæthæ]] || [[word:boshanæjæ|boshanæjæ]] || [[word:boshanæshæ|boshanæshæ]] || [[word:boshanækæ|boshanækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:boshanathatha|boshanathatha]] || [[word:boshanajaja|boshanajaja]] || [[word:boshanashasha|boshanashasha]] || [[word:boshanakaka|boshanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:boshanatha|boshanatha]] || [[word:boshanaja|boshanaja]] || [[word:boshanasha|boshanasha]] || [[word:boshanaka|boshanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:boshanafthaf|boshanafthaf]] || [[word:boshanafjaf|boshanafjaf]] || [[word:boshanafshaf|boshanafshaf]] || [[word:boshanafkaf|boshanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:boshanasha|boshanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:boshanshësha|boshanshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:boshanrosha|boshanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:boshanmusha|boshanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:boshanyasha|boshanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goboshankshësha|goboshankshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goboshankrosha|goboshankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goboshankmusha|goboshankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goboshankyasha|goboshankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:boshashanasha|boshashanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:boshashanshësha|boshashanshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:boshashanrosha|boshashanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:boshashanmusha|boshashanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:boshashanyasha|boshashanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goboshashankshësha|goboshashankshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goboshashankrosha|goboshashankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goboshashankmusha|goboshashankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goboshashankyasha|goboshashankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:beshænasha|beshænasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:beshænshësha|beshænshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:beshænrosha|beshænrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:beshænmusha|beshænmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:beshænyasha|beshænyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobeshænkshësha|gobeshænkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobeshænkrosha|gobeshænkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobeshænkmusha|gobeshænkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobeshænkyasha|gobeshænkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:boshfanasha|boshfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:boshfanshësha|boshfanshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:boshfanrosha|boshfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:boshfanmusha|boshfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:boshfanyasha|boshfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goboshfankshësha|goboshfankshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goboshfankrosha|goboshfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goboshfankmusha|goboshfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goboshfankyasha|goboshfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
